name: Tom Yam Kung (Shrimp Soup)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb prawns, 25-30 count, shelled and deveined (save shells)
1 tsp ground Thai red chili pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove shells from prawns and rinse. Put shells in a pot and add enough water to cover them. Cover pot, bring mixture to boil and simmer for 15 minutes. Strain the broth; set aside.
2. Combine garlic, kafir leaves, lemon juice, Thai fish sauce, lemon grass, sugar, and chili pepper. (Sauce can be made several days in advance and stored in the refrigerator.)
3. Bring soup stock to a boil, add prawns, mushrooms, and the basic sauce. Bring to boil briefly until prawns cook. Garnish with cilantro.
